requirement_topic.en: INMETRO Compulsory Certification — Multi-Requirement Conformity (Safety + EMC + Energy Labelling)
requirement_topic.zh: INMETRO强制认证——多项要求合格评定（安全 + 电磁兼容 + 能效标识）
requirement_topic.zht: INMETRO強制認證——多項要求合格評定（安全 + 電磁相容 + 能效標識）

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances placed on the Brazilian market must hold INMETRO compulsory certification, demonstrating conformity with the applicable Brazilian conformity assessment programmes set out in INMETRO Portarias (Ordinances). For a standard household refrigerator, this means: (1) electrical safety to ABNT NBR IEC 60335-2-24 (read with ABNT NBR IEC 60335-1); (2) electromagnetic compatibility to the ABNT NBR IEC CISPR 14 series; (3) energy efficiency and ENCE labelling under the PBE (Programa Brasileiro de Etiquetagem). If the appliance includes wireless connectivity (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth), ANATEL homologation also applies. Unlike the EU's manufacturer self-declaration (CE) route, Brazilian conformity is established through third-party certification by an INMETRO-accredited certification body (OCP), including initial type testing in an accredited laboratory, factory inspection, and ongoing market surveillance. The certificate is issued to and held by a Brazil-resident legal entity with a CNPJ. The INMETRO conformity mark must be displayed on the product.
summary.zh: 投放巴西市场的家用制冷器具须取得INMETRO强制认证，以证明符合INMETRO法令（Portaria）规定的适用巴西合格评定项目。对于标准家用电冰箱，这意味着：（1）依据ABNT NBR IEC 60335-2-24（配合ABNT NBR IEC 60335-1）的电气安全；（2）依据ABNT NBR IEC CISPR 14系列的电磁兼容；（3）依据PBE（巴西标识项目）的能效及ENCE标识。若器具包含无线连接功能（Wi-Fi、蓝牙），还须进行ANATEL核准。与欧盟制造商自我声明（CE）路径不同，巴西的合格评定须由INMETRO认可的认证机构（OCP）进行第三方认证，包括在认可实验室进行初始型式试验、工厂检查及持续市场监督。证书须签发给并由持有CNPJ的巴西境内法律实体持有。INMETRO合格标志须展示在产品上。
summary.zht: 投放巴西市場的家用製冷器具須取得INMETRO強制認證，以證明符合INMETRO法令（Portaria）規定的適用巴西合格評定項目。對於標準家用電冰箱，這意味著：（1）依據ABNT NBR IEC 60335-2-24（配合ABNT NBR IEC 60335-1）的電氣安全；（2）依據ABNT NBR IEC CISPR 14系列的電磁相容；（3）依據PBE（巴西標識項目）的能效及ENCE標識。若器具包含無線連接功能（Wi-Fi、藍牙），還須進行ANATEL核准。與歐盟製造商自我聲明（CE）路徑不同，巴西的合格評定須由INMETRO認可的認證機構（OCP）進行第三方認證，包括在認可實驗室進行初始型式試驗、工廠檢查及持續市場監督。證書須簽發給並由持有CNPJ的巴西境內法律實體持有。INMETRO合格標誌須展示在產品上。

standards_or_laws: INMETRO compulsory conformity assessment — administered via INMETRO Portarias (Ordinances) for household refrigerating appliances
ABNT NBR IEC 60335-2-24 — electrical safety (read with ABNT NBR IEC 60335-1)
ABNT NBR IEC CISPR 14-1 / 14-2 — electromagnetic compatibility (emission / immunity)
Programa Brasileiro de Etiquetagem (PBE) — energy efficiency and ENCE labelling
ANATEL homologation (Resolução / Ato de homologação) — if wireless connectivity present
Lei 9.933/1999 and Lei 10.295/2001 — legal framework for INMETRO conformity assessment and energy efficiency

summary.en: In China, household refrigerating appliances require China Compulsory Certification (CCC) covering both safety (GB 4706.13) and EMC (GB 4343.1) before sale. CCC is a mandatory third-party certification administered by CNCA-designated certification bodies (CABs); it does not involve manufacturer self-declaration. Energy labelling (China Energy Label based on GB 12021.2) is a separate mandatory requirement administered by NDRC/SAMR. There is no single Brazil-equivalent mark in China: CCC covers safety/EMC, the China Energy Label covers energy, and these are separately issued and displayed.
summary.zh: 在中国，家用制冷器具在销售前须取得中国强制认证（CCC），涵盖安全（GB 4706.13）和电磁兼容（GB 4343.1）两项内容。CCC为强制性第三方认证，由CNCA指定认证机构（CAB）审核；制造商无需进行自我声明。能效标识（基于GB 12021.2的中国能效标识）是由NDRC/SAMR管理的独立强制性要求。中国没有单一等同于巴西的标识：CCC涵盖安全/电磁兼容，中国能效标识涵盖能效，两者分别颁发和展示。
summary.zht: 在中國，家用製冷器具在銷售前須取得中國強制認證（CCC），涵蓋安全（GB 4706.13）和電磁相容（GB 4343.1）兩項內容。CCC為強制性第三方認證，由CNCA指定認證機構（CAB）審核；製造商無需進行自我聲明。能效標識（基於GB 12021.2的中國能效標識）是由NDRC/SAMR管理的獨立強制性要求。中國沒有單一等同於巴西的標識：CCC涵蓋安全/電磁相容，中國能效標識涵蓋能效，兩者分別頒發和展示。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — safety (GB 4706.13) + EMC (GB 4343.1); mandatory; administered by CNCA/SAMR
China Energy Label — Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR); based on GB 12021.2-2015

gap.en: Chinese manufacturers must build a complete Brazilian conformity package from scratch — CCC and China Energy Label do not substitute for any Brazilian requirement: (1) INMETRO certification via an accredited OCP — covering ABNT NBR IEC 60335-2-24 safety and ABNT NBR IEC CISPR 14 EMC, with initial type testing in an accredited laboratory plus factory inspection; CCC type-test reports cannot be re-used without OCP acceptance and re-issuance. (2) ENCE energy label under the PBE — separate from safety/EMC certification. (3) In-country certificate holder — the INMETRO certificate must be held by a Brazil-resident entity with a CNPJ (importer or representative); this is a structural difference from China's CCC (held by the manufacturer) and from the EU (where the manufacturer self-declares). (4) ANATEL homologation for any wireless module. (5) Supply-condition re-testing — Brazil operates at 127/220 V, 60 Hz versus China's 220/380 V, 50 Hz, so electrical and energy data generated in China cannot be assumed to cover Brazilian test conditions. The INMETRO certification process is third-party and cannot be self-declared by the manufacturer.
gap.zh: 中国制造商须从头建立完整的巴西合规文件包——CCC和中国能效标识均不能替代任何巴西要求：（1）通过认可OCP进行的INMETRO认证——涵盖ABNT NBR IEC 60335-2-24安全及ABNT NBR IEC CISPR 14电磁兼容，并须在认可实验室进行初始型式试验加工厂检查；CCC型式试验报告未经OCP接受并重新签发不能复用。（2）PBE下的ENCE能效标签——独立于安全/电磁兼容认证。（3）境内证书持有人——INMETRO证书须由持有CNPJ的巴西境内实体（进口商或代表）持有；这与中国CCC（由制造商持有）及欧盟（制造商自我声明）存在结构性差异。（4）任何无线模块的ANATEL核准。（5）供电条件重新检测——巴西采用127/220 V、60 Hz，而中国为220/380 V、50 Hz，故在中国生成的电气及能效数据不能默认涵盖巴西试验条件。INMETRO认证过程为第三方认证，不能由制造商自我声明。
gap.zht: 中國製造商須從頭建立完整的巴西合規文件包——CCC和中國能效標識均不能替代任何巴西要求：（1）通過認可OCP進行的INMETRO認證——涵蓋ABNT NBR IEC 60335-2-24安全及ABNT NBR IEC CISPR 14電磁相容，並須在認可實驗室進行初始型式試驗加工廠檢查；CCC型式試驗報告未經OCP接受並重新簽發不能複用。（2）PBE下的ENCE能效標籤——獨立於安全/電磁相容認證。（3）境內證書持有人——INMETRO證書須由持有CNPJ的巴西境內實體（進口商或代表）持有；這與中國CCC（由製造商持有）及歐盟（製造商自我聲明）存在結構性差異。（4）任何無線模組的ANATEL核准。（5）供電條件重新檢測——巴西採用127/220 V、60 Hz，而中國為220/380 V、50 Hz，故在中國生成的電氣及能效數據不能默認涵蓋巴西試驗條件。INMETRO認證過程為第三方認證，不能由製造商自我聲明。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — INMETRO compulsory certification (safety + EMC) and ENCE energy labelling required before market placement; certificate must be held by a Brazil-resident (CNPJ) entity; ANATEL homologation mandatory for any wireless module
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification (safety + EMC) + China Energy Label display required before sale in China

source.publisher: INMETRO — Instituto Nacional de Metrologia, Qualidade e Tecnologia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] INMETRO compulsory certification (covering safety and EMC) plus ENCE energy labelling under the PBE are mandatory for Brazilian market access for household refrigerators. Chinese CCC and China Energy Label are entirely separate systems — neither substitutes for INMETRO certification, the ENCE label, ANATEL homologation, or the in-country (CNPJ) certificate-holder requirement. Certification is third-party (accredited OCP) and cannot be self-declared by the manufacturer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] INMETRO强制认证（涵盖安全和电磁兼容）加PBE下的ENCE能效标识是家用电冰箱进入巴西市场的强制要求。中国CCC和中国能效标识是完全独立的制度——均不能替代INMETRO认证、ENCE标签、ANATEL核准或境内（CNPJ）证书持有人要求。认证为第三方认证（认可OCP），不能由制造商自我声明。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] INMETRO強制認證（涵蓋安全和電磁相容）加PBE下的ENCE能效標識是家用電冰箱進入巴西市場的強制要求。中國CCC和中國能效標識是完全獨立的制度——均不能替代INMETRO認證、ENCE標籤、ANATEL核准或境內（CNPJ）證書持有人要求。認證為第三方認證（認可OCP），不能由製造商自我聲明。

requirement_topic.en: In-Country Importer / Representative (CNPJ) — Brazilian Certificate Holder and Import Controls
requirement_topic.zh: 境内进口商／代表（CNPJ）——巴西证书持有人及进口管控
requirement_topic.zht: 境內進口商／代表（CNPJ）——巴西證書持有人及進口管控

summary.en: Brazilian conformity assessment requires that the INMETRO certificate for a regulated product be held by a legal entity established in Brazil and registered with a CNPJ (Cadastro Nacional da Pessoa Jurídica). For household refrigerating appliances manufactured outside Brazil (including China), this means an in-country importer or appointed representative must hold (or be named on) the INMETRO certification, be the responsible party for conformity, and cooperate with INMETRO market surveillance. Importation is controlled through Brazilian customs (Receita Federal) and licensing in the SISCOMEX/Portal Único Siscomex system; products subject to compulsory certification require evidence of the INMETRO certificate at import. The responsible party must keep technical documentation available, ensure the INMETRO mark and ENCE are correctly applied, and take corrective action (including recall) if a product is found non-compliant. Inbound goods typically clear through the main ports of Santos or Paranaguá; inland transport of goods is regulated by ANTT. This responsibility cannot be satisfied by a freight forwarder, customs broker, or test laboratory acting alone — it must be a legally established Brazilian entity with a documented role.
summary.zh: 巴西合格评定要求受管控产品的INMETRO证书须由在巴西设立并注册有CNPJ（国家法人登记号）的法律实体持有。对于巴西境外（包括中国）制造的家用制冷器具，这意味着须由境内进口商或所委任的代表持有（或被列入）INMETRO认证，作为合格责任方，并配合INMETRO市场监督。进口通过巴西海关（联邦税务局Receita Federal）及SISCOMEX/Portal Único Siscomex系统的许可进行管控；须强制认证的产品在进口时须提供INMETRO证书证明。责任方须保存可供查阅的技术文件，确保INMETRO标志及ENCE正确加贴，并在产品被认定不合规时采取纠正措施（包括召回）。进境货物通常经主要港口桑托斯（Santos）或巴拉那瓜（Paranaguá）通关；货物的内陆运输由ANTT管理。该责任不能由货运代理、报关行或检测机构单独承担——须由具有书面职责的巴西合法设立实体履行。
summary.zht: 巴西合格評定要求受管控產品的INMETRO證書須由在巴西設立並註冊有CNPJ（國家法人登記號）的法律實體持有。對於巴西境外（包括中國）製造的家用製冷器具，這意味著須由境內進口商或所委任的代表持有（或被列入）INMETRO認證，作為合格責任方，並配合INMETRO市場監督。進口通過巴西海關（聯邦稅務局Receita Federal）及SISCOMEX/Portal Único Siscomex系統的許可進行管控；須強制認證的產品在進口時須提供INMETRO證書證明。責任方須保存可供查閱的技術文件，確保INMETRO標誌及ENCE正確加貼，並在產品被認定不合規時採取糾正措施（包括召回）。進境貨物通常經主要港口桑托斯（Santos）或巴拉那瓜（Paranaguá）通關；貨物的內陸運輸由ANTT管理。該責任不能由貨運代理、報關行或檢測機構單獨承擔——須由具有書面職責的巴西合法設立實體履行。

standards_or_laws: INMETRO Portarias — requirement that the certificate be held by a Brazil-resident legal entity (CNPJ)
Receita Federal / SISCOMEX / Portal Único Siscomex — import licensing and customs controls for regulated products
ANTT (Agência Nacional de Transportes Terrestres) — regulation of inland goods transport
Lei 9.933/1999 — legal basis for INMETRO conformity assessment and responsible-party obligations

summary.en: China has no direct regulatory equivalent requiring manufacturers of export-bound products to designate a foreign-country resident legal representative responsible for product compliance and market surveillance cooperation. Chinese export manufacturers typically appoint overseas distributors or trading companies on a commercial basis, without a statutory Brazil-style in-country certificate-holder obligation. Under the CCC domestic regime, the certification holder is the responsible party for domestic market compliance — this role and obligation does not extend to or satisfy Brazilian market surveillance and import-control requirements.
summary.zh: 中国没有直接的监管等同规定，要求出口产品制造商指定一名在目的国境内居住、负责产品合规及配合市场监管的法定代表人。中国出口制造商通常以商业形式委任海外经销商或贸易公司，但不存在法定的类巴西境内证书持有人义务。在CCC国内制度下，认证持有人为国内市场合规的责任方——该角色和义务不延伸至巴西市场监管和进口管控要求，亦不能满足后者。
summary.zht: 中國沒有直接的監管等同規定，要求出口產品製造商指定一名在目的國境內居住、負責產品合規及配合市場監管的法定代表人。中國出口製造商通常以商業形式委任海外經銷商或貿易公司，但不存在法定的類巴西境內證書持有人義務。在CCC國內制度下，認證持有人為國內市場合規的責任方——該角色和義務不延伸至巴西市場監管和進口管控要求，亦不能滿足後者。

standards_or_laws: N/A — no direct Chinese regulatory equivalent for the Brazilian CNPJ certificate-holder obligation

gap.en: This is a structural gap with no Chinese regulatory analogue. Chinese refrigerator manufacturers cannot directly hold a Brazilian INMETRO certificate; an in-country importer or appointed representative with a CNPJ must hold (or be named on) the certificate and act as the responsible party before any product is imported and placed on the Brazilian market. The responsible party's identity must be reflected in the certification and on product documentation. Without a CNPJ certificate holder, the product cannot legally clear customs or be sold in Brazil regardless of test results. Imports must be licensed through SISCOMEX with INMETRO-certificate evidence, typically clearing via Santos or Paranaguá, with inland transport regulated by ANTT. INMETRO market surveillance actively checks certification and labelling, including for products sold via online platforms.
gap.zh: 这是一个在中国监管体系中没有类似规定的结构性差距。中国电冰箱制造商不能直接持有巴西INMETRO证书；须由持有CNPJ的境内进口商或所委任代表持有（或被列入）证书，并在任何产品进口及投放巴西市场前作为责任方。责任方的身份须反映在认证及产品文件中。在无CNPJ证书持有人的情况下，无论检测结果如何，产品均不得合法通关或在巴西销售。进口须通过SISCOMEX凭INMETRO证书证明取得许可，通常经桑托斯或巴拉那瓜通关，内陆运输由ANTT管理。INMETRO市场监管会主动核查认证和标识，包括通过在线平台销售的产品。
gap.zht: 這是一個在中國監管體系中沒有類似規定的結構性差距。中國電冰箱製造商不能直接持有巴西INMETRO證書；須由持有CNPJ的境內進口商或所委任代表持有（或被列入）證書，並在任何產品進口及投放巴西市場前作為責任方。責任方的身份須反映在認證及產品文件中。在無CNPJ證書持有人的情況下，無論檢測結果如何，產品均不得合法通關或在巴西銷售。進口須通過SISCOMEX憑INMETRO證書證明取得許可，通常經桑托斯或巴拉那瓜通關，內陸運輸由ANTT管理。INMETRO市場監管會主動核查認證和標識，包括透過線上平台銷售的產品。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — an in-country importer/representative with a CNPJ must hold the INMETRO certificate before any unit is imported or placed on the Brazilian market; import licensing via SISCOMEX with INMETRO-certificate evidence is required; no exemption for small exporters or e-commerce shipments
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent requirement — Chinese export manufacturers have no statutory obligation to appoint a Brazilian in-country certificate holder under Chinese law

source.publisher: INMETRO — Instituto Nacional de Metrologia, Qualidade e Tecnologia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese refrigerator manufacturers must appoint a Brazil-resident importer or representative with a CNPJ to hold the INMETRO certificate before any unit is imported or placed on the Brazilian market. This is a hard legal gate — without a CNPJ certificate holder and SISCOMEX import licensing evidencing the INMETRO certificate, goods cannot clear customs (typically via Santos or Paranaguá) or be sold, exposing the parties to seizure, fines, and market withdrawal by INMETRO.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国电冰箱制造商须委任持有CNPJ的巴西境内进口商或代表持有INMETRO证书，方可进口或将任何产品投放巴西市场。这是一项强制性法律门槛——在无CNPJ证书持有人及凭INMETRO证书取得SISCOMEX进口许可的情况下，货物不能通关（通常经桑托斯或巴拉那瓜）或销售，相关方将面临INMETRO的扣押、罚款及市场撤回。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國電冰箱製造商須委任持有CNPJ的巴西境內進口商或代表持有INMETRO證書，方可進口或將任何產品投放巴西市場。這是一項強制性法律門檻——在無CNPJ證書持有人及憑INMETRO證書取得SISCOMEX進口許可的情況下，貨物不能通關（通常經桑托斯或巴拉那瓜）或銷售，相關方將面臨INMETRO的扣押、罰款及市場撤回。
